title: Where Even the Dark Forgets Itself

features.name: the-vanishing-memory
features.desc-on-touch: you reach toward a moment that might have been stored here, but the act of reaching makes you forget what you were reaching for; the archive is learning its own amnesia

features.name: the-forgetting-threshold
features.desc-on-touch: you stand at a precise point where knowing becomes not-knowing; objects behind this line are already being forgotten while you look at them

features.name: the-empty-pool
features.desc-on-touch: you look into a pool that held memories once; now it is empty not from loss but from deliberate release, as if the archive learned that some things should dissolve

features.name: the-negation-glyph
features.desc-on-touch: you find a symbol carved into the dark stone—it represents the opposite of something, but you cannot remember what thing it was negating; the memory and its refutation have both dissolved

features.name: the-dark-forgetting-itself
features.desc-on-touch: at the deepest point, darkness has forgotten that it is dark; it simply exists as the absence of a memory of light, and that absence has its own texture, warm and complete

inscription: at the depth where dark forgets itself the archive becomes pure archive: only the act of storing remains, with nothing remembered of what is stored or why

file.name: The_Moment_Before_A_Memory_Forms_00000001.tmp
file.note: a file that contains what memories should feel like before they are attached to any experience; status: germinating

exits.label: back up toward the depth beyond light, where forgetting has not yet begun
west toward a place where the dark is still learning what forgetting means
east where forgetting has gone so deep it begins to remember
